title: sagina apetala subsp. densa
intro: Sagina apetala subsp. densa, commonly known as dense pearlwort, is a flowering plant species in the carnation family that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The medicinal properties of this plant are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Sagina apetala subsp. densa include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
